Home → Discography → The Story

The Story

2006 · Real Talk Entertainment

Released during one of the most turbulent periods of his career, estranged from Bone Thugs-N-Harmony and battling personal demons, Bizzy channeled his isolation into a remarkably focused solo statement. Produced by Big Hollis, Tron Treez, and Vince V., the album features no guest artists whatsoever, a deliberate choice that gives it the feel of an unfiltered confessional. Lyrically it moves through autobiography, defiance, and vulnerability in equal measure. Remarkably, it arrived just 21 days after Thugs Revenge, making it the second of four solo albums Bizzy released in 2006 alone.

"Bryon, Orion my vision I'm here to unite the fuckin aliens and angels."

— It’s Only Me
